prompt: In the current repo, extend memory_system/distillation/workflow_planner.py and memory_system/distillation/coding_proxy.py so the proxy builds and injects a structured workflow plan, then cover it in tests/test_step6_coding_distillation.py.

In this repo, add JSONL export support in memory_system/distillation/exporter.py and re-export it from memory_system/distillation/__init__.py, with regression coverage in tests/test_step6_coding_distillation.py.
In the current codebase, add shell command logging to memory_system/distillation/coding_proxy.py and assert it in tests/test_step6_coding_distillation.py.

In this repo, add accepted-trace similarity retrieval to memory_system/distillation/coding_log.py and thread those priors through memory_system/distillation/coding_proxy.py with tests in tests/test_step6_coding_distillation.py.

In the current repo, add plan-eval support in memory_system/distillation/eval_harness.py and re-export it from memory_system/distillation/__init__.py with regression coverage in tests/test_step6_coding_distillation.py.
